g.text: No credential-bearing arrow ever crosses out of kaalm-system. The key
reaches the provider on the gateway's upstream leg and nowhere else, so the agent never holds it, and
the three holders retain it differently:
in memory for the process lifetime,
only for the length of a probe,
never. Agent Pods are additionally blocked from calling
providers directly by NetworkPolicy: see Protecting Agent Containers from LLM Provider Access.
